archetype: Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) mixed with Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) - 'Old Money Tech' variant

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-semibold

anti_patterns: Do not use Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans for headings.
Do not exceed text-6xl for the Hero heading.
Do not center paragraphs or dense text; left-align instead.

layout_and_grids.spacing_scale: Use generous spacing. Use py-24 for main section padding.

strategies.marketing_hero: Asymmetrical layout. Large serif headline left-aligned, overlapping an abstract dark architectural image. Use max 80vh for mobile hero height.
strategies.cacerias_bento: Control Room Grid Mode. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4. Strict 1px grid borders with tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6). Cards should stretch to fill height.
strategies.pro_tips: Tetris Grid Mode. Asymmetrical masonry or bento layout spanning multiple rows/cols to create visual tension.
strategies.comparative_table: Full-width data table, left-aligned columns for text, right-aligned for numbers.

surface_strategies.header_nav: Glassmorphism (Crystal Variant). backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60. 1px bottom border-white/10.
surface_strategies.cards_cacerias: Grid Borders (Technical Look). Sharp edges (rounded-none or max rounded-sm). 1px solid border (border-white/10). Flat background, no shadow.
surface_strategies.buttons: Flat Solid. bg-[#C5A059] text-black hover:bg-[#D4AF37] hover:text-black transition-colors.

components.caceria_card: Use pure div or highly customized Shadcn Card. Flat, sharp edges. Header includes the Cacería name in Serif, data/filters in Monospace. Must include a 'Copy URL' button.
components.navigation: Sticky top or Left Sidebar for desktop, hamburger drawer for mobile. Navigation links must be clearly visible.
components.comparative_table: Shadcn Table. Remove rounded corners. Add hover row highlights.
components.tradingview_chart: Embed widget container. Must have a dark theme parameter in its embed configuration.
components.workflow_pipeline: Visual step-by-step layout using connected nodes or an asymmetrical flex layout with arrows.
components.pro_tips_grid: Cards of varying sizes (col-span-1 vs col-span-2) holding 20+ tips.

icons_and_assets.icon_style: Duotone or Regular weight. Ensure consistency.

image_urls.description: Abstract dark financial data environment, Bloomberg terminal meets luxury
Abstract dark geometric pattern for background sections
Close-up of stock market data with fluctuating numbers
Black flat screen computer monitor for the setup educational section

animations.hover_states: Subtle translation (-translate-y-1) and border color shift on interactive cards.
animations.entrance: Staggered fade-in-up for lists and grid items.
animations.scroll: Install and configure lenis for smooth momentum scrolling to enhance the premium feel.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='copy-url-button').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Text over backgrounds must meet APCA or WCAG AA standards. Use text shadows if placed over the hero image without the gradient overlay.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme and 'Old Money Tech' archetype using the exact hex codes provided.
Use Playfair Display for headings and IBM Plex Sans for body text. Ensure JetBrains Mono is used for filter recipes and numeric data.
Install Google Fonts in the HTML or via standard CSS imports.
All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
Do not use default Shadcn rounded cards. Override radii to be sharp (rounded-none or rounded-sm max) and use the 1px subtle borders to achieve the Grid Borders/Technical Look.
For the Hero section, overlay the hero_background image with the hero_overlay gradient to ensure text readability.
Use the provided image URLs. Do NOT use any placeholder services.
Implement the 8 Cacerias strategies using a bento/control-room grid. They are the core of the app.

Create a functional backend interaction (e.g., simple fastAPI + sqlite or localStorage mock if full backend isn't possible, but problem statement specifies fullstack for saving favorites, so build the backend endpoints for saving favorite cacerias).
